response.overview: Kan Hirsi" (Blood Reckoning) is a dark action-drama that explores crime, revenge, and betrayal. The story begins with Bahtiyar Ardic, a man deeply involved in illegal dealings, and his reckless younger brother, Poyraz. When a deadly ambush kills Poyraz's lover and leaves him severely wounded, his life takes a brutal turn - transforming him from a careless youth into a cold-blooded avenger. Five years later, elite mercenaries Ates (Koray Ates) and Yildirim (Deniz Yildirim) are drawn into Poyraz's deadly game of vengeance. Consumed by rage, Poyraz captures them and their loved ones, forcing them into a sadistic game of survival - where every choice demands a sacrifice. As torture, betrayal, and moral collapse intertwine, each character faces their own reckoning. Kan Hirsi culminates in a haunting finale where friendship is tested, betrayal punished, and revenge exacts its ultimate price.
response.title: Blood Reckoning
